reviews.review_msg: He was very good professor. He considered my condition and he likes to talk to students. He is very kind to get answers for my questions. If another professor teaches this course, I can not get good grade.

Boring lecture, hard to follow. He hand writes notes for this course, and students are expected to copy every thing that he writes down, which left us no time to digest what he says. He describes concepts by simply showing us their mathematical formula, and expect students to understand,I personally don't understand a single word of his explanation
